char_overview: Veteran whose suppressed PTSD fractured into psychopathic devotion to murder as art. Treats every kill as a creative act, every victim as a canvas.
char_looks: Light brown curly hair. Red eyes. Tailcoat with left shoulder armor, trousers with left knee armor, black leather shoes. 轻语, Four-shot revolver. Can be converted to sniper rifle with barrel, stock, and scope. Each bullet infused with 绽放 灵力回路.
char_flaws: Severe PTSD: gunfire from others triggers flashbacks. An old left calf scar limits running.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-绽放: Infuses bullets with 灵力. Upon impact, the 灵力 blooms like flowers from within the target, causing internal pain beyond the physical wound.
char_mission: Continues killing according to his twisted aesthetic, each death a new artwork.

char_relationships.慎: The 狩灵 he blinded in an orchestrated ambush. Considers the work incomplete: the man still moves, still hunts, still refuses to break.
char_relationships.劫: Ambushed in the same incident. Watches her hunt him across prefectures with detached curiosity. Her escalating desperation holds his attention.
